api_host.description: The API host for your Skills Base instance, for example https://api.skills-base.com. Do not include a trailing slash.
api_host.title: API Host

client_id.description: Skills Base API client ID used to fetch access tokens.
client_id.title: Client ID

start_date.description: Start date for incremental skill_ratings sync, in YYYY-MM-DD format.
start_date.title: Start Date

client_secret.description: Skills Base API client secret used to fetch access tokens.
client_secret.title: Client Secret

access_token.title: Access Token (auto-managed)
access_token.description: OAuth access token cached by the connector after a successful client_credentials exchange. Do not set manually; populated and refreshed automatically.

token_expiry_date.title: Token Expiry (auto-managed)
token_expiry_date.description: ISO-8601 timestamp marking when the cached access token expires. Auto-managed by the connector.
